name: marketimmune-dashboard
description: Agentic market-safety research platform for crypto perps with a terminal dashboard, audited immune loop, and markout evaluation roadmap.

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n api,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.serve: npm run build:django && python manage.py runserver
scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend && python manage.py migrate && python manage.py load_metrics

author: MarketImmune Team
